basic_details.job_title: Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Driver Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat website. The last date to submit the application form is 24-05-2026.

application_fee.details: For BC-A Category: Rs 200/- For SC/ ST/ PWD Category: Nil

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 42 Years

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Driver post at Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Driver post is 24th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Driver position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Driver post at Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Driver recruitment at Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Driver position is as per FPL-04, which is a standard pay level for government jobs. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The qualification for the Driver post is reserved for BC-A category candidates. Specific educational qualifications are detailed in the official advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. When will the online application portal be active?
faq.answer: The online application portal will be active from 10:00 hrs on 4th May 2026 and will remain open until 12:00 midnight on 24th May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or by visiting the official website of Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Driver post. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for confirmation.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat?
faq.answer: The official website of Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat is www.mnssrai.com. You can visit this site for more information and updates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The Driver position at Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat is a Full Time job, indicating a regular employment opportunity.
